feature.label: BSW Builder Feature
feature.description: Walking-skeleton feature that bundles all Autosar_tool RCP plugins: common (RCP shell), ui (handlers + views), and the MemIf module plugin. ARTOP / Sphinx integration will be added once the build is proven.
feature.copyright: Research / internal demo only — see NOTICE.md at repo root.
feature.license: v0.1 / v0.2 are derived from ORIENTAIS Configurator V25.10 and not for redistribution. See NOTICE.md.
